---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any other approaches? Why is this one preferred?

## Additional context

Mockups, links to related issues, or other background that would help.
